overview: Naturopathic wellness practice offering personalized hormone and metabolic support through functional bloodwork analysis and lifestyle guidance. Services include educational lab reviews with personalized recommendations for nutrition, supplements, and wellness practices.
highlights: Personalized video interpretation of comprehensive bloodwork panels
At-home functional testing with detailed analysis
Enhanced weight loss support with metabolic planning
targetAudience: Women seeking natural approaches to hormone balance and metabolic health who want to understand underlying patterns in their health.
